title: Chest pain: When to see a doctor
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Chest pain should not be ignored and may represent heart attack or other serious disease.
Patient-facing chest pain guidance should emphasize urgent escalation for concerning symptoms.
This source supports warning-sign education, not static low-risk ED risk stratification.
